properties.remark: MARICOPA COUNTY SHERRIFS OFFICE REPORTS MULTIPLE ROAD CLOSURES ALONG THE CAVE CREEK IN CAVE CREEK. WASHES RUNNING IN AREA.
MARICOPA COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTED A SWIFT WATER RESCUE ALONG THE SKUNK CREEK NEAR 7TH STREET.

EXTENSIVE FLOODING OF ALL STREAMS IN AND AROUND SAN CARLOS...PERIDOT...AND CUTTER. PRIMARY AREAS AFFECTED INCLUDE GILSON WASH BETWEEN SAN CARLOS AND CUTTER... WHERE HOME EVACUATIONS HAVE OCCURRED. WATER IS ALSO COVERING THE ROADWAY NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF STATE ROUTE 170 AND PERIDOT SIGHTING ROAD...SOUTH OF SAN CARLOS.
20+ HOUSES REPORTED FLOODED ALONG TONTO CREEK...SOUTH OF PUNKIN CENTER...NEAR LAKEVISTA DR AND CLINE BLVD. SPOTTER REPORTED THAT EARTHEN DYKE BROKE DURING EVENT...LEADING TO FLOODING.

GILA COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS NUMEROUS EVACUATIONS HAVE TAKEN PLACE AT RV AND TRAILER PARKS ALONG THE TONTO CREEK. ROUGH ESTIMATION OF 50 TO 75 PEOPLE EVACUATED. SHELTER HAS BEEN SET UP IN TONTO BASIN.
